Initialized(uint64).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

activeLegacyAndUnswap(uint256,address[],.details: Beneficiary claims the legacy; if the owner has an active storage-token swap, it is atomically swapped back to ETH and distributed in the same transaction.

autoSwap(uint256,(address,uint256,uint25.details: Forwards ETH + swap config to the individual legacy contract. The individual contract swaps ETH -> storageToken and sends tokens to the owner's wallet.

getEthToTokenAmountOut(uint256,address).details: Returns the expected token amount out for a given ETH amount via Uniswap V2.

getNextLegacyAddress(address).details: Get next legacy address that would be created for a sender. Uses the clone prediction when `legacyImplementation` is set, otherwise falls back to the creation-code prediction.

getTokenToEthAmountOut(uint256,address).details: Returns the expected ETH amount out for a given token amount via Uniswap V2.

releaseCreateFlag(uint256).details: Self-service flag-release for owners of already-tombstoned legacies. `deleteLegacy` reverts on legacies that have already been activated (the underlying contract's `isActiveLegacy` modifier blocks delete after `_isActive == 2`), which historically left their owners with a stuck `isCreateLegacy[sender] = true` and no path back. This entry point lets the owner clear that flag for any of their legacies that the system itself considers no-longer-live (claimed by a beneficiary, or deleted via `deleteLegacy`). Authorization: caller must be the legacy's recorded owner. The `isLive()` check on the child contract returns false for both the `_isActive == 2` (claimed) and `_isLive == 2` (deleted) terminal states, so this covers every case where `isCreateLegacy[owner]` could have been left dangling. Idempotent and chain-safe: re-entering on a fresh legacy reverts `LegacyStillActive`; re-entering on the same dead legacy is a no-op write that keeps the flag false.

setLegacyImplementation(address).details: Point new legacies at an EIP-1167 minimal-proxy implementation. Once set, `createLegacy` deploys ~45-byte clones (~40k gas) instead of the full ~18KB bytecode (~6M gas). Pass `address(0)` to fall back to the legacy bytecode path. Existing legacies are unaffected by this change.

unswap(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256).details: Forwards unswap request to the individual legacy contract. Pulls storageToken from owner's wallet, swaps to ETH, sends ETH to owner.
